content:
[{'text': 'I can see the robot is now facing right and appears to be in the black wall area. The robot is at approximately (11.04, 9.72) which seems to be in the black wall between the two white corridors. 

Looking at the map more carefully, I notice the map has:
- A white corridor at the top (between the top black band and the upper-middle black band) - this is where the destination is
- A white corridor in the middle (between the upper-middle and lower-middle black bands) - this is where I started
- A white corridor at the bottom

The robot seems to have entered the black wall. I need to navigate back to the white corridor. Let me move right to try to get to the right edge where there might be a passage.

Let me move forward (right) to try to find the right edge of the map.', 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_014xJdCVqfBsiXhgXYHGqEnn', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'distance_meters': 0.5}, 'name': 'move_forward', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
